channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Scottie Scheffler in a landslide to win PGA Tour player of the year for third straight time
item.description: Scottie Scheffler added another trophy to his awesome display Tuesday when he won the Jack Nicklaus Award as PGA Tour player of the year in a landslide, joining Tiger Woods as the only players to win the award three straight times.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lanier scores 22 points as No. 1 Tennessee beats Miami 75-62 at Jimmy V Classic
item.description: Chaz Lanier scored 22 points, and No. 1 Tennessee beat struggling Miami 75-62 on Tuesday night at the Jimmy V Classic in Madison Square Garden.
item.dc:creator: Larry Fleisher, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rangers agree on $75 million, 3-year deal to keep RHP Nathan Eovaldi, AP source says
item.description: The Texas Rangers and right-hander Nathan Eovaldi have agreed on a $75 million, three-year contract, a person with knowledge of the deal tells The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lindsey Vonn will serve as a forerunner, test out the course before World Cup races at Beaver Creek
item.description: Lindsey Vonn will test out the downhill and super-G courses as a forerunner before the World Cup races this weekend in Beaver Creek, Colorado. The U.S. Ski Team confirmed her role Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Washington Nationals win lottery for first No. 1 overall draft pick since teen Bryce Harper in 2010
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Washington Nationals will have the No. 1 overall pick in the amateur draft for the first time since selecting a 17-year-old Bryce Harper in 2010.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Girls Basketball: Point Loma 36, Mar Vista 22
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in Point Loma with the Pointers hosting Mar Vista. Pointers win this one 36-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Mbappe, Vinicius and Bellingham on target as Real Madrid beats Atalanta 3-2. Liverpool wins again
item.description: Real Madrid’s big stars turned on the style to revive the Spanish giant’s faltering Champions League title defense on Tuesday. Galacticos Kylian Mbappe, Vinicius Junior and Jude Bellingham all scored in a thrilling 3-2 win at Italian league leader Atalanta.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Buccaneers and Habitat Hillsborough join forces for Holiday Home Build and Revival
item.description: On Tuesday morning, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and Habitat for Humanity of Hillsborough joined forces once again to address affordable housing in Hillsborough County.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nolan Arenado open to switch from third base to first and leaving Cardinals for a team he approves
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Nolan Arenado is open to a trade from the St. Louis Cardinals, at age 33 wanting to be on a World Series contender. “It’s like his biological clock is ticking,” agent Joel Wolfe said Tuesday at the winter meetings.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: French rugby players are cleared of sexual assault in Argentina
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — An Argentine court on Tuesday dropped aggravated sexual assault charges against two professional French rugby players accused of raping a woman after playing a match in the country earlier this year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brooks Koepka anticipates Ryder Cup vibe in LIV vs. PGA Tour match in Las Vegas
item.description: Brooks Koepka feels like he could be stepping into another Ryder Cup environment, match play with bragging rights at stake, even if it's only two-man teams competing in one match instead of 12-man teams in 28 matches.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick's known ties to the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
item.description: Belichick, 72, is considered by many to be the greatest NFL head coach of all time and was the architect of the New England Patriots dynasty from 2001-2019.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: High school girls basketball rankings Dec. 10, 2024: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: High school girls basketball rankings: Mitty stays at No. 1, Northgate and Castilleja enter the Top 20 as St. Francis moves up.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: SHR closure leads to a seat shakeup in NASCAR. A look at who is driving where in 2025
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — There won't be a Stewart-Haas Racing in NASCAR next season now that Hall of Famer Tony Stewart has left the series and the four-car organization he co-owned with Formula 1 team owner Gene Haas.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Micah Parsons aches after botched blocked punt costs Cowboys in loss to Bengals
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Micah Parsons rocked back and forth on the bench in agony after Cincinnati's winning touchdown that followed a botched blocked punt from his Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit for opener in Japan, but not be on the mound
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit when the reigning World Series champions open their season in Japan against the Chicago Cubs on March 18 and 19.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press, a deal that could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brayden Point's 4-point night leads the Lightning over the Canucks 4-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored twice and added two assists, and the Tampa Bay Lightning edged the Vancouver Canucks 4-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks' losing streak reaches 4 games after 4-2 loss to Bruins
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Brad Marchand and Morgan Geekie each scored two goals, and the Boston Bruins beat the struggling Chicago Blackhawks, 4-2 , on Wednesday night. Boston posted its third consecutive win — all in the past four days. It rallied for a 3-2 overtime victory against Detroit on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
